title: Fyxe's Default+
description: A base modpack to expedite the creation of other modpacks. It consists of configurated optimization mods and small visual tweaks.
body:
# WELCOME!
![Fyxe's Default Plus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/335c01c1fe7e5bb4ca5179ed62f7afeee988ad9b.png)

## What is this?
- This is used as the basis for all of my other modpacks
- Contains many optimization mods that are specifically configured
- Contains visual tweaks such as falling leaves and cave dust
- Contains slight gameplay tweaks such as villager names and double doors
- Contains Full vanilla PBR resourcepack and my additional PBR addons

## Why would I use this?
- Its an easy way to kick-start your modpack creation!
- Play vanilla minecraft at lightning speed!  
- You have my full permission to use this in any modpack.
